negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_569946b9-15fe-4547-8c56-373e41075a27
prompt: The video captures a serene outdoor scene with a vibrant flower field and a majestic mountain view. A dense carpet of violet-pink flowers stretches across the foreground, creating a stunning visual display. A paved pathway curves around the flowers in a counterclockwise direction, with a fork leading to the right. People stroll and stand along the path, dressed in long-sleeved shirts and pants. A woman wearing a broad-brimmed beige sunhat and a long white tunic walks away from the camera, her hat and tunic swaying gently in the breeze. Another woman in a black-and-white checkered dress, black leggings, and a tote bag pauses to take a photograph of the flowers. Three individuals facing the camera and walking toward the right carry umbrellas for shade.  To the right of the path, a field of pale green grass with light sand-colored soil stretches out, bordered by knee-high landscape fences of wooden posts and white cords. The camera begins with a tilt-up, revealing a clear and sunny day with bright natural light. Further afield, people stroll along distant paths, adding life to the tranquil setting. A band of trees in varying shades of olive green spans the frame, with a cluster of tall dark evergreens in the middle. The most prominent peak in the backdrop is a snow-capped mountain, dominating the horizon. Fluffy white clouds hover at the peak of the snow-capped mountain and at the tops of the lower mountains. The sky is a clear, light steel blue, occupying the top half of the frame. The overall scene is peaceful and picturesque, capturing the beauty of nature and human activity harmoniously.
